title: Fault Tolerance & Retry
subtitle: Fault Tolerance & Retry
description: Detecting, recovering, and retrying when LLM calls fail, responses are truncated, or formats are malformed. Agent system robustness depends on fault tolerance design.
sub_problems: API call failures: network timeouts, rate limits, service unavailability
Response format errors: JSON parsing failures, missing required fields
Response truncation: output exceeds max_tokens and gets cut off
Hallucination detection: LLM generates non-existent tool names or parameters
Cascading failures: one Agent failure crashes the entire workflow
Multi-provider avalanche: one provider's continuous failures slow down the entire system
LLM output structure validation: JSON field types/enum values don't match Agent expectations
Configuration error early detection: YAML config missing or type errors only exposed at runtime
best_practices: Retry is mandatory: any LLM call can fail, retries are a basic requirement
Exponential backoff + jitter: prevent retry storms, add random jitter
Set maximum retry count: infinite retries exhaust budget
Log every failure: enables post-mortem failure pattern analysis
Design fallback strategies upfront: don't decide degradation tactics in production
Circuit breaker three-state protection: fail fast on continuous failures, probe recovery periodically
Sliding window error rate tracking: more accurate than simple counters for real-time health
Pydantic model validation for LLM output: compile-time type safety + runtime structure validation
Two-layer retry decoupling: business and transport layers retry independently with clear responsibilities

values.DeepTutor: ProviderContextWindowError detects context overflow; Pydantic field_validator detects tool name hallucinations
Two-layer retry: Factory tenacity exponential backoff (max=120s) + Provider 1.5^n+random backoff

values.MiroThinker: Last retry still truncated→return truncated result and continue
values.DeepTutor: Multi-language Prompt fallback chain (zh→cn→en); safe_parse returns default value
tenacity exponential backoff, Factory layer max=5 retries, Provider layer max=3 retries
values.PageIndex: Fixed interval sleep(1) + max_retries=10, broad except Exception catch

values.DeepTutor: Circuit breaker open→fail fast; safe_parse returns default value to continue execution
values.PageIndex: Three-level progressive degradation: TOC with page numbers → TOC without page numbers → full text scan without TOC, triggered when accuracy<0.6

values.DeepTutor: 11-level exception hierarchy + rule chain mapping engine, distinguishes retryable/non-retryable
values.PageIndex: No exception type distinction, unified catch; semantic layer quantifies quality via accuracy
Targeted fix: only retry failed entries (max_attempts=3), not full batch retry

values.DeepTutor: ErrorRateTracker 60s sliding window, 50% threshold triggers alert_callback
values.PageIndex: JsonLogger records accuracy and degradation decisions per step, no real-time alerts

values.DeepTutor: Pydantic BaseModel validates LLM output structure, ValidationError→LLMParseError→retry
ConfigValidator validates YAML completeness at startup, distinguishes error/warning levels

values.PageIndex: finish_reason + LLM completeness dual-condition gating, chat_history concatenation for continuation up to 5 rounds

solutions.title: Truncation Auto-expansion + Error Classification Retry + Timeout Protection
solutions.description: openai_client.py:128-192 detects finish_reason=="length" and auto-expands max_tokens*1.1, max 10 retries; if last retry still truncated, returns truncated result without crashing. openai_client.py:228-277 intelligent error classification: TimeoutError→retry, CancelledError→throw, "Error code: 400"+"longer than"→context overflow fast-fail. base_client.py:222 @with_timeout(600) adds 10-minute timeout protection to LLM calls. Fixed 30s wait interval.

solutions.title: SubagentExecutor 5-State Machine + Dual Thread Pools + Dangling Tool Call Middleware
solutions.description: executor.py implements 5-state machine PENDING→RUNNING→COMPLETED/FAILED/TIMED_OUT. Dual thread pools: _scheduler_pool(3) + _execution_pool(3). 15-minute hard timeout execution_future.result(timeout=900s), FuturesTimeoutError marks TIMED_OUT and cancel(). DanglingToolCallMiddleware scans AIMessage.tool_calls missing ToolMessage in before_model hook, injects status="error" placeholder. Global _background_tasks + thread lock ensures concurrency safety.

solutions.title: Cross-layer URL Deduplication + Semaphore Concurrency Protection + Search Source Degradation Chain
solutions.description: DeepResearchSkill tree recursion passes visited_urls set across layers for URL-level deduplication avoiding duplicate fetches. asyncio.Semaphore(2) limits max 2 concurrent sub-queries per layer, preventing API rate limits. Each sub-query creates isolated GPTResearcher instance. Search source failure auto-degrades: Tavily→Google→search summary fallback. breadth halved progressively max(2, breadth//2) controls exponential explosion. Final trim_context_to_word_limit(25000) trims context.

solutions.title: Four-Layer Fault Tolerance & Circuit Breaker
solutions.description: Circuit breaker protection and error rate monitoring for multi-provider scenarios, preventing continuous failures from exhausting budget

solutions.title: Multi-Layer Fault Tolerance & Three-Level Degradation
